categories.title: Modular Skirting
categories.description: Premium modular skirting solutions for seamless wall-to-floor integration, featuring easy installation and high durability.

products.title: Easy Fix
products.description: Easy Fix is designed to be installed on wall, gypsum, and plywood partitions and on top of all kinds of flooring. It features a capping strip to camouflage rivet points.
products.customization: Yes (PVC or Aluminum capping color options)

installation_details.surface: Suitable for wall, gypsum & plywood partitions

products.title: Easy Stick
products.description: Easy Stick offers a quick and clean installation with self-adhesive backing, ideal for smooth surfaces and curved walls.
products.customization: Color Match Available

products.title: Illusion - Recessed
products.description: A minimalist architectural solution that creates a 'floating wall' effect by recessing into the drywall.
products.customization: LED Channel Integration

performance_features.Protection: Protects wall base from floor cleaning

products.title: Illusion - Fineline
products.description: Ultra-thin profile skirting for a sleek and modern interior finish without the bulk of traditional skirting.
products.customization: Powder Coating Options

products.title: Expression
products.description: Decorative skirting with intricate profiles that add character and elegance to any room.
products.customization: Paintable Surface

installation_details.finish: Can be painted to match walls

products.title: Easy Click 40
products.description: Features a hidden clip-on system for easy removal and cable management behind the skirting.
products.customization: Internal/External Corner Connectors

products.title: Bello-PVC Skirting
products.description: Standard high-durability PVC skirting for general purpose commercial and residential use.
products.customization: Vast Color Range

products.title: Bello-PVC Skirting for Resilient Floors
products.description: Specifically designed with a flexible bottom lip to sit flush on resilient floors like vinyl or rubber.
products.customization: Anti-Microbial Coating Optional
